name: Chocolate Covered Cherry Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, cocoa, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat together the butter and sugar on low speed of an electric mixer until fluffy.
4. Add the egg and vanilla; beat well.
5. Stir in the dry ingredients; mix well.
6. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and place on ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Press a cherry half and chocolate chips into the center of each ball.
8. In a small saucepan, combine the chocolate chips and milk until the chocolate is melted (or heat in the microwave oven).
9. Stir in 1 tablespoon of the drained liquid from the cherries.
10. Spoon 1 tablespoon of the chocolate/milk mixture over each cherry.
11. Bake for 10 minutes.
